casadi_control.discretization.collocation.

DirectCollocation#

class casadi_control.discretization.collocation.DirectCollocation(N=None, grid=None, *, grid_kind='normalized', degree=3, scheme='flgr')[source]#

Bases: Discretization

Direct collocation discretization frontend.

This class configures a collocation scheme (table family + degree) and a mesh, and provides methods to:

  • build a solver-facing NLP (build())

  • generate an initial guess (guess())

  • decode raw solver output into trajectories (postprocess())

  • convert results to/from serializable artifacts (to_artifact(), from_artifact())

Parameters:
Nint, optional

Number of mesh intervals. Ignored when grid is provided.

gridarray-like, optional

User-specified mesh nodes. Interpreted according to grid_kind.

grid_kind{“normalized”, “physical”}, optional

Interpretation of grid:

  • "normalized": nodes are in the discretization coordinate s ∈ [0, 1].

  • "physical": nodes are physical-time nodes and are normalized internally.

degreeint, optional

Number of collocation points per mesh interval.

schemestr, optional

Collocation table family identifier (e.g. "flgr").

Attributes:
table

Collocation coefficient table for the configured scheme/degree.

Methods

build(ocp)

Transcribe ocp into an NLP with the configured collocation scheme.

guess(nlp, *[, strategy, prev])

Generate an initial guess for the collocation NLP.

postprocess(ocp, nlp, sol)

Postprocess a raw collocation solution into trajectories.

to_artifact(sol, pp)

Convert a solved result into a serializable artifact.

from_artifact(art)

Rebuild a plot-ready postprocessed result from an artifact.

Notes

This object does not solve the NLP. Solving is handled by the solver layer (e.g. casadi_control.solvers.solve_ipopt()) or the high-level casadi_control.solve() orchestration function.

Create a direct-collocation discretization configuration.

Attributes:
table

Collocation coefficient table for the configured scheme/degree.

Methods

build(ocp)

Transcribe ocp into an NLP with the configured collocation scheme.

from_artifact(art)

Rebuild a plot-ready postprocessed result from an artifact.

guess(nlp, *[, strategy, prev])

Generate an initial guess for the collocation NLP.

postprocess(ocp, nlp, sol)

Postprocess a raw collocation solution into trajectories.

to_artifact(sol, pp)

Convert a solved result into a serializable artifact.
